article_items.title: Company : TechCrunch AI
article_items.description: [MEDIUM] Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything Company : TechCrunch AI Summary : Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured. Link :
